# Alfred North Whitehead

*1861 – 1947 · British*

British mathematician and philosopher, father of process philosophy: reality is made not of substances but of events, occasions of experience composing themselves in becoming; nature is creativity, a continual advance into novelty.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
